label: Conveyor Belt Monitoring

CO326 - Conveyor Belt Fault Detection
MQTT → InfluxDB pipeline with RUL estimation and dashboard controls

name: Format for InfluxDB
Fault Alert Logic
RUL Estimator (OLS)
📊 CO326 Conveyor Belt — Data Pipeline & RUL Estimator
info:
This flow:
1. Subscribes to ESP32 sensor data via MQTT
2. Parses JSON and writes to InfluxDB
3. Computes RUL using OLS linear regression
4. Monitors for fault conditions
5. Provides manual and HTTP relay control

name: 🎛 Relay Controls (Manual + HTTP)
info:
Inject nodes for manual control.
HTTP endpoint /belt-control for Grafana integration.
